title: Baylis & Harding The Fuzzy Duck Winter Wonderland Luxury Hand Care Gift Set (Pack of 1) - Vegan Friendly
features: LUXURY GIFT SET: Indulge in the Fuzzy Duck Winter Wonderland body fragrance with pear, cranberry and mulberry notes
VEGAN FRIENDLY: Treat yourself or a loved one to this luxurious hand care gift set - suitable for vegans
HAND CARE: This set includes 300 ml hand wash and 300 ml hand & body lotion for smooth, nourished hands throughout the winter season
FEATURES: A premium vegan-friendly formulation that is gentle on the skin while leaving a delightful fruity scent
PERFECT GIFT: The perfect pampering present for Christmas, birthdays or special occasions - luxury hand care at its finest!
description: Product Description Delightful wooden rack displaying a 300ml hand wash and 300ml hand & body lotion, perfect to keep your hands moisturised during the cold winter months. A joyful celebration of Christmas traditions and festive delights, this winter wonderland of deliciously scented gifts is the perfect seasonal treat. Indulge your senses with festive cranberry, plum pudding, candy apple and spiced pear fragrances, all wrapped up in the classic festive colour blends of berry reds and navy blue. Charming seasonal motifs adorn the design symbolising Joy, Peace and Love to spread festive cheer to everyone this festive season. Christmas isn't Christmas without the gentle aroma of festive scents in the air. Indulge in traditional favourite such as Festive Cranberry, Plum Pudding, Spiced Pear, Candy Apple. Ingredients HAND WASH: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Limonene.HAND & BODY LOTION: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Amyl Cinnamal, Benzaldehyde, Cinnamal, Cinnamomum Zeylanicum Bark Oil, Cinnamyl Alcohol, Eugenol. Directions Apply an appropriate amount of lotion to hands and massage gently. Use as needed or daily. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Nash Road, Redditch, B98 7AS See more
